Dashboard USDC Yields USDT Yields Ethereum Pools

Earn 10x More Interest on Your Savings

Traditional banks pay you less than 0.5% interest. Decentralized Finance (DeFi) pays up to 15%. We scan secure digital vaults to find you the best interest rates automatically.

💡 New to DeFi yields? Start here.

Decentralized Finance (DeFi) allows you to act as your own bank. Here is a simple 60-second explanation of the numbers in the table below to help you get started safely.

1. What is APY? (Interest Rate)

Annual Percentage Yield. This is your yearly interest rate. If you deposit $1,000 in a pool with 10% APY, you will earn $100 in interest over a year.

2. What is TVL? (Safety Score)

Total Value Locked. This is the total amount of money deposited by other savers in that vault. The higher this number (e.g. $100M+), the safer and more trusted the platform is.

3. What are Stablecoins? (Low Risk)

Cryptocurrencies like USDC or USDT are digital dollars. They are always worth exactly $1.00 USD. Staking stablecoins lets you earn high interest without worrying about price drops.

🚀 How to start: 1. Set up a secure wallet (like Phantom or MetaMask) • 2. Buy USDC/USDT • 3. Pick a pool below & deposit!
